description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular layout. The exterior walls are finished in a light tan color, complemented by large, black-framed windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. The house features a driveway leading to a two-car garage, flanked by two mature trees and a small front yard with hedges. The interior layout is visible, showing multiple rooms including a living area, kitchen, bedrooms, and bathrooms, each with distinct color accents. The rear of the house opens to a patio area, suggesting outdoor living space. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a two-car garage, surrounded by trees and a small yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, two-car garage, main entry, and two large trees flanking the entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long exterior wall, large windows, and a glimpse of the backyard patio area.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the patio, multiple room layouts, and large windows facing the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the flat roof, rear rooms, and a tree near the back corner.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, no porch, flanked by a driveway and minimal landscaping.
